texto: Dear bullies, see that young boy you made fun of for crying? Last night his best friend committed suicide. See the girl you called fat? She's starving herself. See the old man you just made fun of cause of the ugly scars? He fought for our country. Post this if you're against bullying. I bet 95% of you won't.
autor: Marija Not sure if she penned it but I snagged it from her I love it
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Marija Not sure if she penned it but I snagged it from her I love it que provoca temas ligados a motivacao. Ao questionar “Dear bullies, see that young boy you made fun of for crying? Last night his best friend committed…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre motivacao, awareness, bullying, com foco em boa-noite e inspiracao.
